category.scope_note: Portable lithium battery cells, battery packs, and power banks (China export to Nepal) compliance gap comparison.

title.en: China-to-Nepal Lithium Battery & Power Bank Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国锂电池/移动电源进入尼泊尔：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國鋰電池/行動電源進入尼泊爾：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of China lithium battery and power bank documentation against Nepal requirements: NBSM (Nepal Bureau of Standards and Metrology) NS conformity where in scope, NS/IEC 62133 cell safety, NTA radio approval for wireless functions, UN 38.3 transport, and in-country importer obligations. Nepal is landlocked; shipments route via Kolkata / Visakhapatnam in India.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国锂电池/移动电源合规文件与尼泊尔要求对照：NBSM（尼泊尔标准与计量局）适用范围内的NS符合性、NS/IEC 62133电芯安全、含无线功能产品的NTA无线电核准、UN 38.3运输及本地进口商义务。尼泊尔为内陆国，货物经印度加尔各答/维沙卡帕特南转运。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國鋰電池/行動電源合規文件與尼泊爾要求對照：NBSM（尼泊爾標準與計量局）適用範圍內的NS符合性、NS/IEC 62133電芯安全、含無線功能產品的NTA無線電核准、UN 38.3運輸及本地進口商義務。尼泊爾為內陸國，貨物經印度加爾各答/維沙卡帕特南轉運。

disclaimer.en: For informational purposes only. Not legal advice. Regulations change; verify all requirements with qualified legal and technical advisors before export. This page does not constitute a certification decision, legal opinion, conformity-assessment-body assessment, customs determination, or market-access approval.
disclaimer.zh: 仅供参考，不构成法律意见。法规随时变化，出口前请向具备资质的法律及技术顾问核实所有要求。本页不构成认证结论、法律意见、合格评定机构评审、海关裁定或市场准入批准。
disclaimer.zht: 僅供參考，不構成法律意見。法規隨時變化，出口前請向具備資質的法律及技術顧問核實所有要求。本頁不構成認證結論、法律意見、合格評定機構評審、海關裁定或市場准入批准。

answer_first.en: Chinese lithium battery and power bank exporters to Nepal should address NBSM NS conformity where the product falls within a mandatory NS scheme, NS/IEC 62133 cell safety, NTA type approval for wireless functions, UN 38.3 transport documentation, and appointment of an in-country importer of record — none of which are satisfied by China's GB 31241 or CCC certification. Nepal does not operate an EU-style horizontal battery, RoHS, or EPR regime; many requirements are met through IEC-based NS standards and importer-side documentation.
answer_first.zh: 中国锂电池及移动电源向尼泊尔出口商应处理：产品落入强制NS方案时的NBSM NS符合性、NS/IEC 62133电芯安全、含无线功能产品的NTA型号核准、UN 38.3运输文件，以及任命本地进口商——上述要求均无法由中国GB 31241或CCC认证替代。尼泊尔不实行欧盟式横向电池、RoHS或EPR制度；许多要求通过基于IEC的NS标准及进口商方文件满足。
answer_first.zht: 中國鋰電池及行動電源向尼泊爾出口商應處理：產品落入強制NS方案時的NBSM NS符合性、NS/IEC 62133電芯安全、含無線功能產品的NTA型號核准、UN 38.3運輸文件，以及任命本地進口商——上述要求均無法由中國GB 31241或CCC認證替代。尼泊爾不實行歐盟式橫向電池、RoHS或EPR制度；許多要求通過基於IEC的NS標準及進口商方文件滿足。

editorial_controls.change_policy: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, verification flag, and last_verified before human_reviewed can be true. Official regulator, standards body, or primary legal source preferred (NBSM, NTA, UNECE, IEC, or equivalent authority). Local PDFs are not accepted as primary sources.
